01926| ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
01927| 
01928| :dp:`fls_eeyxu730z2pw`
01929| A :dt:`dynamically sized type` is a :t:`type` that does not implement the
01930| :std:`core::marker::Sized` :t:`trait`.
01931| 
01932| .. _fls_2sja3okj27ne:
01933| 
01934| elaboration
01935| ^^^^^^^^^^^
01936| 
01937| :dp:`fls_xoahzmwu1std`
01938| :dt:`Elaboration` is the process by which a :t:`declaration` achieves its
01939| runtime effects.
01940| 
01941| .. _fls_bxm4njfo2h58:
01942| 
01943| element type
01944| ^^^^^^^^^^^^
01945| 
01946| :dp:`fls_3bndijf8g9os`
01947| An :dt:`element type` is the :t:`type` of the elements of an :t:`array type` or
01948| a :t:`slice type`.

01950| :dp:`fls_pvyl887dn016`
01951| See :s:`ElementType`.
01952| 
01953| .. _fls_vygjg858yxej:
01954|

01956| ^^^^^^
01957| 
01958| :dp:`fls_lo3c3n9wy6qz`
01959| For :dt:`elided`, see :t:`elided lifetime`.
01960| 
01961| .. _fls_l2181y5566ck:
01962| 
01963| elided lifetime
01964| ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
01965| 
01966| :dp:`fls_9q28407ev0a6`
01967| An :dt:`elided lifetime` is either an :t:`unnamed lifetime` or a :t:`lifetime`
01968| that has been explicitly omitted from a :t:`function signature` or an
01969| :t:`implementation`.
01970| 
01971| .. _fls_ff5zp7m9d5ot:
01972| 
01973| else expression
01974| ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
01975| 
01976| :dp:`fls_inp7luoqkjc5`
01977| An :dt:`else expression` is an :t:`expression` that represents either a
01978| :t:`block expression`, an :t:`if expression`, or an :t:`if let expression`.
01979| 
01980| :dp:`fls_2jniy6bkq1hn`
01981| See :s:`ElseExpression`.
01982| 
01983| .. _fls_iwed9n4jz6b8:
01984| 
01985| empty statement
01986| ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
01987| 
01988| :dp:`fls_irw5gwuvj3nn`

01990| (semicolon).
01991| 
01992| .. _fls_1qu1t74ga8aa:
01993| 
01994| entity
01995| ^^^^^^
01996| 
01997| :dp:`fls_mdbck557k8sy`
01998| An :dt:`entity` is a :t:`construct` that can be referred to within program
01999| text, usually via a :t:`field access expression` or a :t:`path`.

00121| .. rubric:: Syntax
00122| 
00123| .. syntax::
00124| 
00125|    VisibilityModifier ::=
00126|        CratePublicModifier
00127|      | SelfPublicModifier
00128|      | SimplePathPublicModifier
00129|      | SimplePublicModifier
00130|      | SuperPublicModifier
00131| 
00132|    CratePublicModifier ::=
00133|        $$pub$$ $$($$ $$crate$$ $$)$$
00134| 
00135|    SelfPublicModifier ::=
00136|        $$pub$$ $$($$ $$self$$ $$)$$
00137| 
00138|    SimplePathPublicModifier ::=
00139|        $$pub$$ $$($$ $$in$$ SimplePath $$)$$
00140| 
00141|    SimplePublicModifier ::=
00142|        $$pub$$
00143| 
00144|    SuperPublicModifier ::=
00145|        $$pub$$ $$($$ $$super$$ $$)$$
00146| 
00147| .. rubric:: Legality Rules
00148| 
00149| :dp:`fls_7kpepal8ghuj`
00150| :dt:`Visibility` is a property of :t:`[field]s` and :t:`[item]s` that determines
00151| which :t:`[module]s` can refer to the :t:`name` of the :t:`field` or :t:`item`.
00152| 
00153| :dp:`fls_2m0qkn47vy9d`
00154| A :dt:`name` is an :t:`identifier` that refers to an :t:`entity`.
00155| 
00156| :dp:`fls_qo0itr5il1kk`
00157| :dt:`Public visibility` is a kind of :t:`visibility` that allows for a :t:`name`
00158| to be referred to from arbitrary :t:`module` ``M`` as long as the ancestor
00159| :t:`[module]s` of the related :t:`entity` can be referred to from ``M``.
00160| 
00161| :dp:`fls_knjruq5wppv`
00162| :dt:`Private visibility` is a kind of :t:`visibility` that allows a :t:`name`
00163| to be referred to only by the current :t:`module` of the :t:`entity`, and its
00164| descendant :t:`[module]s`.
00165| 
00166| :dp:`fls_t7i4n19qdgn4`
00167| A :dt:`visibility modifier` sets the :t:`visibility` of a :t:`name`.
00168| 
00169| :dp:`fls_aa4f3rvir9lm`
00170| A :dt:`crate public modifier` is a :t:`visibility modifier` that grants a
00171| :t:`name` :t:`public visibility` within the current :t:`crate` only.
00172| 
00173| :dp:`fls_tnh7o3pb4e22`
00174| A :dt:`self public modifier` is a :t:`visibility modifier` that grants a
00175| :t:`name` :t:`private visibility`. A :t:`self public modifier` is equivalent
00176| to a :t:`simple path public modifier` where the :dt:`simple path` denotes
00177| :t:`keyword` ``self``.
00178| 
00179| :dp:`fls_yymgpyi67dty`
00180| A :dt:`simple path public modifier` is a :t:`visibility modifier` that grants a
00181| :t:`name` :t:`public visibility` within the provided :t:`simple path` only.
00182| 
00183| :dp:`fls_hc121mxknq03`
00184| The :t:`simple path` of a :t:`simple path public modifier` shall start
00185| with a :t:`path segment` (an element of a :t:`path`) expressed by either :t:`keyword` ``crate``,
00186| :t:`keyword` ``self``, or :t:`keyword` ``super``.
00187| 
00188| :dp:`fls_icztzxjpm1du`
00189| The :t:`simple path` of a :t:`simple path public modifier` shall resolve to
00190| an ancestor :t:`module` of the current :t:`module` or the current :t:`module`
00191| itself.
00192| 
00193| :dp:`fls_np8aghofjqhm`
00194| A :dt:`simple public modifier` is a :t:`visibility modifier` that grants a
00195| :t:`name` :t:`public visibility`.
00196| 
00197| :dp:`fls_quzvhzpr0124`
00198| A :dt:`super public modifier` is a :t:`visibility modifier` that grants a
00199| :t:`name` :t:`public visibility` within the parent :t:`module` only. A
00200| :t:`super public modifier` is equivalent to a :t:`simple path public modifier`
00201| where the :t:`simple path` denotes :t:`keyword` ``super``.
00202| 
00203| :dp:`fls_utgjx6l5zwfl`
00204| An external :t:`item`, a :t:`field`, or an :t:`item` that appears without a
00205| :t:`visibility modifier` has :t:`private visibility` by default.
00206| 
00207| :dp:`fls_jifg2st5bfd6`
00208| An :t:`associated item` of a :t:`trait` has the same :t:`visibility` as the
00209| :t:`trait`.
00210| 
00211| :dp:`fls_dm0xr424ine1`
00212| An :t:`enum variant` and its :t:`[field]s` have the same :t:`visibility` as the
00213| containing :t:`enum type`.
00214| 
00215| .. rubric:: Examples
00216| 
00217| .. code-block:: rust
00218| 
00219|    pub mod outer_module {
00220|        pub mod inner_module {
00221|            pub(crate) fn crate_visible_function() {}
00222| 
00223|            pub(self) fn inner_module_visible_function() {}
00224| 
00225|            pub(super) fn outer_module_visible_function() {}
00226| 
00227|            pub fn visible_function() {}
00228| 
00229|            fn caller() {
00230|                crate_visible_function();
00231|                inner_module_visible_function();
00232|                visible_function();
00233|            }
00234|        }
00235| 
00236|        fn caller() {
00237|            inner_module::crate_visible_function();
00238|            inner_module::outer_module_visible_function();
00239|            inner_module::visible_function();
00240|        }

00492| keyword]s`.
00493| 
00494| :dp:`fls_jpecw46eh061`

00496| #31 for :t:`Unicode` version 16.0, with the following profile:
